zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford於大約1161年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素時，他的父親Hugh de Saye51歲，母親Lucia de Clifford25歲。他於大約1178年與Mabel Marmion在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1196年在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford was born about 1161, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Saye, was 51 and his mother, Lucia de Clifford, was 25. He married Mabel Marmion about 1178, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1196, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford est né environ 1161, à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Saye, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lucia de Clifford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mabel Marmion environ 1178, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1196, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

Er hat um 1178 in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England Mabel Marmion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Saye Baron of Burfordが約1161年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルで生まれた時，父Hugh de Sayeは51歳，母Lucia de Cliffordは25歳であった。約1178年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルでMabel Marmionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1196年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford(이)가 대략 1161년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Saye(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia de Clifford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1178년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 Mabel Marmion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1196년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford родился около 1161 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Saye было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lucia de Clifford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Marmion около 1178 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1196 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.
